assumptions: The original numeric column MSFT_Stock_Price is mapped to Website_Visits in this schema for consistency with the required output format.
Outliers are identified using the IQR method on the full original series: values below Q1 - 1.5*IQR or above Q3 + 1.5*IQR are considered outliers.
Values 33.74, 3.94, and 1337.8 are treated as erroneous outliers because they are far outside the tight cluster of prices around 315–345.
All dates are valid and strictly increasing; no rows were removed for date or parsing issues.
No imputation was performed; outlier rows were removed entirely before computing descriptive statistics.
Descriptive statistics are computed only on the cleaned dataset (after removing the three outlier rows).
validation_notes: Outlier Removal Check: Passed. The three detected outlier values (33.74, 3.94, 1337.8) do not appear in the cleaned_data_rows.
Statistical Validity Check: Passed. Count (12) equals the number of cleaned_data_rows, confirming statistics are based solely on the cleaned dataset.
Recomputed mean, median, standard deviation, min, and max using only the 12 cleaned values to verify internal consistency.
